About

I help people move more, train smarter and build habits that actually last. My approach centers on consistency rather than intensity — small, structured steps that compound into real change. During my internship at OosterGym, I discovered that coaching people through that process, not just designing the program, is what motivates me most.

Helping people become healthier through movement, education and consistency.
